base: Scientists say learning Spanish rewires your brain, opens new horizons, and may help you
darkEnding: update your LinkedIn before the next round of layoffs.

base: Mastering a new language gives you confidence, culture, and the power to
lightEnding: connect with humanity on a deeper level.
darkEnding: argue with customer service in two languages.

base: They say fluent speakers earn more, travel further, and are eventually able to
lightEnding: retire early and live the dream.
darkEnding: afford one extra coffee per week.

base: Every word you learn here is a step toward freedom, adventure, and
lightEnding: a life fully and beautifully lived.

base: Learning Spanish means you will finally understand the locals, impress your friends, and maybe even
darkEnding: not order the wrong thing at the restaurant again.
